title: brachiaria platyphylla
intro: Brachiaria platyphylla, also known as buffalo grass, is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Brachiaria platyphylla include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, or used as a poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
